scripts.build:runtimes: npm run compile && vite build runtime/react && vite build runtime/vue && vite build runtime/svelte && vite build runtime/solid
scripts.build:button: npm run compile:button && vite build runtime/button/react && vite build runtime/button/vue && vite build runtime/button/svelte && vite build runtime/button/solid
scripts.build:dialog: npm run compile:dialog && vite build runtime/dialog/react && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.copyFileSync('runtime/dialog/react/index.html','runtime/dialog/react/public-runtime/index.html');let p=fs.readFileSync('runtime/dialog/react/public-runtime/index.html','utf8').replace('/src/main.jsx','/dialog/react/assets/react-dialog.js');fs.writeFileSync('runtime/dialog/react/public-runtime/index.html',p)" && vite build runtime/dialog/vue && vite build runtime/dialog/svelte && vite build runtime/dialog/solid
scripts.deploy:prepare: npm run build:runtimes && npm run catalog:build
scripts.proof:select: npm run build:runtimes && node proof/select-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.proof:button: npm run build:button && node proof/button-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.proof:dialog: npm run build:dialog && node proof/dialog-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.test: npm run test:workflow && npm run proof:select && npm run proof:button && npm run proof:dialog && npm run proof:popover
scripts.build:native-controls: npm run compile:native-controls && vite build runtime/checkbox/react && node scripts/native-react-index.mjs checkbox && vite build runtime/checkbox/vue && vite build runtime/checkbox/svelte && vite build runtime/checkbox/solid && vite build runtime/switch/react && node scripts/native-react-index.mjs switch && vite build runtime/switch/vue && vite build runtime/switch/svelte && vite build runtime/switch/solid
scripts.proof:native-controls: npm run build:native-controls && node proof/native-control-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:popover: npm run compile:popover && vite build runtime/popover/react && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.copyFileSync('runtime/popover/react/index.html','runtime/popover/react/public-runtime/index.html');let p=fs.readFileSync('runtime/popover/react/public-runtime/index.html','utf8').replace('/src/main.jsx','/popover/react/assets/react-popover.js');fs.writeFileSync('runtime/popover/react/public-runtime/index.html',p)" && vite build runtime/popover/vue && vite build runtime/popover/svelte && vite build runtime/popover/solid
scripts.proof:popover: npm run build:popover && node proof/popover-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.directory:validate: npm --prefix astro run build && node scripts/validate-directory.mjs
scripts.build:form: npm run compile:form && vite build runtime/form/react && vite build runtime/form/vue && vite build runtime/form/svelte && vite build runtime/form/solid && node scripts/form-index.mjs
scripts.proof:form: npm run build:form && node proof/form-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:navigation: npm run compile:navigation && vite build runtime/navigation/react && vite build runtime/navigation/vue && vite build runtime/navigation/svelte && vite build runtime/navigation/solid
scripts.proof:navigation: npm run build:navigation && node proof/navigation-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:data-presentational: npm run compile:data-presentational && vite build runtime/data-presentational/react && vite build runtime/data-presentational/vue && vite build runtime/data-presentational/svelte && vite build runtime/data-presentational/solid
scripts.proof:data-presentational: npm run build:data-presentational && node proof/data-presentational-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:selection-command-date: npm run compile:selection-command-date && vite build runtime/selection-command-date/react && vite build runtime/selection-command-date/vue && vite build runtime/selection-command-date/svelte && vite build runtime/selection-command-date/solid
scripts.proof:selection-command-date: npm run build:selection-command-date && node proof/selection-command-date-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts
